data.title: LangChain vs. LlamaIndex: The Right Framework for the Job, Not the Hype. - DEV Community
data.content_preview:
LangChain vs. LlamaIndex: The Right Framework for the Job, Not the Hype. - DEV Community
TL;DR
LangChain
→ Perfect for fast prototyping, hackathons, and quick experiments. Huge community, tons of examples.
LlamaIndex
→ Built for industry-grade use cases. Reliable, structured, and scales when things get serious.
Smart builders?
They often use both LangChain for rapid iteration + LlamaIndex for production strength.
So I've been tinkering with GenAI for a while now, and one question keeps popping u
